title: potentilla capitata
intro: Potentilla capitata, also known as the Mouse-ear or Purple-rose Potentilla, is a perennial herbaceous plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla capitata include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential in managing diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusions, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
